repo.title: GitHub - vercel/examples: Enjoy our curated collection of examples and solutions. Use these patterns to build your own robust and scalable applications. · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Vercel Templates Hub
manifest_entry.focus: official starter discovery across product categories
teaches: how modern starters are categorized by product need
broad skeletons for AI apps, SaaS, blogs, docs, and dashboards
what a strong official starter ecosystem looks like
how to avoid beginning from a weak blank page
inspect: starter repos linked from the hub
avoid: treating a starter as the final product direction
pulling in a template because it is convenient instead of because it fits the business
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: A strong source for choosing better starting points before custom frontend work begins.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: Good starter selection can save time, but only if the structure matches the product job.
